header.title: Quick Post
header.subtitle: AI drafts a social post in seconds. Edit, then share.

errors.lookup_input_required: Paste an address or listing URL first.

new_listing.label: New listing
new_listing.hint: Announce a property you just listed

price_drop.label: Price drop
price_drop.hint: Re-introduce a listing at a new price

just_sold.label: Just sold
just_sold.hint: Celebrate a deal you just closed

market_update.label: Market update
market_update.hint: Share an observation about your local market

testimonial.label: Testimonial
testimonial.hint: Style a client quote into a polished post

custom.label: Custom
custom.hint: Write your own brief, AI drafts the post

by_address.label: By address / URL
by_address.hint: Paste a listing link or address — we pull the details

new_listing.placeholder: Optional — what's the standout feature? (e.g. 'beautifully updated kitchen, sun-drenched backyard, walk to the village')
new_listing.help: Optional. Specific details make the post sound less generic.

open_house.placeholder: Optional — anything special about the home or the open house (e.g. 'brand-new bathroom, light bites & coffee provided')
open_house.help: Optional. Mention staging, refreshments, or unique features if any.

price_drop.placeholder: Optional — old price + reason (e.g. 'Down from $1.45M to $1.39M — motivated seller, fast close possible')
price_drop.help: Mention the previous price if you want it referenced. AI will not invent numbers.

just_sold.placeholder: Optional — anything special (e.g. 'closed in 14 days, multiple offers, repeat client')
just_sold.help: Optional. Skip client names unless they've explicitly OK'd a public mention.

market_update.placeholder: What's the angle? (e.g. 'Inventory in Pasadena is up 18% MoM, rates have eased below 6.5% — buyers who paused are back')
market_update.help: Specific data points produce better posts than generic 'the market is changing'.

testimonial.placeholder: Paste the client quote verbatim, plus their first name if you have it (e.g. 'Sarah: "Mike made the whole process feel easy — we closed in under 30 days and he negotiated $15k off the asking."')
testimonial.help: AI will use the quote verbatim. Add the client's first name if they've consented to public mention.

custom.placeholder: Describe what the post should say — angle, tone, any specifics worth including.
custom.help: Be specific — names, neighborhoods, numbers, and angles help AI write a post that doesn't sound generic.

by_address.placeholder: Paste a listing URL (Zillow, Redfin, MLS, etc.) or just type an address.
by_address.help: We'll look up the property and pre-fill the brief with what we find — you can edit before generating.

step1.title: What's this about?
step1.subtitle: Pick the angle of your post.

step2.subtitle_lookup: We'll pull the property details and seed the brief.
step2.subtitle_brief: AI writes the post directly from your brief.
step2.subtitle_picker_new_listing: Pick a listing from the last 60 days.
step2.subtitle_picker_just_sold: Pick a recent closing to celebrate.

lookup.input_placeholder: 123 Main St, Pasadena CA — or paste a Zillow / Redfin / MLS URL
lookup.result_not_found: Property not in our database — using what you typed
lookup.brief_help: AI never invents details — edit to add anything else you want mentioned (open-house time, standout features, etc.).

step3.title: Draft + share
step3.subtitle: AI writes a platform-specific caption. Edit anything before sharing.

actions.ig_no_compose: Instagram has no web compose — copy the caption, save the image, and post from the IG app. Or connect a Page to publish directly.
actions.no_share: Direct share unavailable on this platform

schedule.label: Publish at (your local time)
schedule.cron_hint: Cron picks it up every 5 minutes. Actual publish may land up to 5 min after your chosen time.

recurring.hint_prefix: The materialize cron creates a scheduled post for each occurrence about an hour before fire time. You can pause or cancel anytime from the

connect_nudge.linkedin_suffix: and we'll post to your personal feed directly.

compose_hint.linkedin: LinkedIn's share dialog only honors the link — the body won't pre-fill. Tap Copy caption first, then paste into the LinkedIn compose.
compose_hint.default: Caption won't pre-fill — copy it first.

footer: Phase 1: opens the platform's compose dialog with your caption. Phase 2 (in ~4 weeks) will post directly after one-time authorization — no extra click required.

image.library_empty: Your library is empty. Upload an image to get started.
image.upload_label: Upload a new image (JPG / PNG / WEBP, ≤ 20 MB)
image.prompt_suffix: — attach a photo so you have it ready when sharing. Optional.

empty_subjects.new_listing: No listings from the last 60 days. Create a listing first, or use the Custom option.
empty_subjects.open_house: No upcoming open houses in the next 21 days. Schedule one, or use the Custom option.
empty_subjects.price_drop: No active listings to re-price. Add or activate a listing first.
empty_subjects.just_sold: No transactions closed in the last 60 days. Use the Custom option to draft a general celebration post.
empty_subjects.default: Nothing to pick here — use the Custom option.
